constraints.description: Keep a rollback path available for the change
constraints.rationale: Minimizing risk requires an easy way to revert if issues appear
constraints.verificationMethod: Confirm the rollout can be disabled or reverted without manual data repair

constraints.description: Keep the change scope narrow to reduce regression surface area
constraints.rationale: Smaller changes reduce the number of failure modes introduced at once
constraints.verificationMethod: Review the touched files and modules for unnecessary breadth

constraints.description: Protect existing behavior with explicit regression coverage
constraints.rationale: Regression safety is part of the stated top priority
constraints.verificationMethod: Run targeted regression tests around existing behavior

constraints.rationale: This free-text constraint was provided directly during brainstorming and should be preserved
constraints.verificationMethod: Review the implementation against the exact stated constraint during design and testing

inScope: query-route-graph 工程或研发内部使用

Address the stated problem: 继续收敛：该功能是 OpenFlow Runtime 内部的 Query Route Graph，用于 query-only 后台任务的跨会话复用。第一版不提供用户命令、不提供用户开关、不做用户可见审计、不写专用 debug 日志。普通用户完全无感；AI/agent/runtime 内部自动 lookup、decide、record。它应与 Drift Guardian 共用 singleton/runtime 管理模型，但作为 sibling service 保持职责分离，不并入 drift guardian 语义。后续如果需要调试，另做通用 Diagnostics/Trace Runtime，让多个 OpenFlow 子系统统一接入。

query-route-graph works for the target users: 工程或研发内部使用
query-route-graph implementation reflects the selected priority: 风险最小
query-route-graph respects the stated constraint: 风险最小
